scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,shopper -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace APP_shopper_and_buyer"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,cyan "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --prefix Web_Version_APP"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently -k -n server,admin -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --prefix Internal_Web_Admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n server,shopper,web,admin -c blue,magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace APP_shopper_and_buyer" "npm run dev --prefix Web_Version_APP" "npm run dev --prefix Internal_Web_Admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace APP_shopper_and_buyer && npm run build --prefix Web_Version_APP && npm run build --prefix Internal_Web_Admin
